all_queries.name: Dashboard - Product Summary
all_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_products, SUM(CASE WHEN p_is_active = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS active_products, SUM(CASE WHEN p_is_featured = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS featured_products, SUM(CASE WHEN p_is_active = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inactive_products, SUM(CASE WHEN p_qty <= 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS out_of_stock_products, SUM(CASE WHEN p_qty BETWEEN 1 AND 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS low_stock_products, SUM(CASE WHEN p_qty > 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS healthy_stock_products, COALESCE(SUM(p_qty), 0) AS total_u

all_queries.name: Dashboard - Pending Orders Count
all_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_order WHERE order_status = 'Pending'

all_queries.name: Dashboard - Confirmed Orders Count
all_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_order WHERE order_status = 'Confirmed'

all_queries.name: Dashboard - Completed Today Revenue
all_queries.sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_price), 0) FROM tbl_order WHERE order_status = 'Completed' AND DATE(order_date) = CURDATE()

all_queries.name: Orders - Full List
all_queries.sql: SELECT * FROM tbl_order ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 50

all_queries.name: Orders - Status Counts
all_queries.sql: SELECT order_status, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM tbl_order GROUP BY order_status ORDER BY cnt DESC
all_queries.extra: Using index; Using temporary; Using filesort

all_queries.name: Order Details - Main Order
all_queries.sql: SELECT * FROM tbl_order WHERE id = 1

all_queries.name: Order Details - Order Items
all_queries.sql: SELECT * FROM tbl_order_details WHERE order_id = 1

all_queries.name: Order Details - Status Log
all_queries.sql: SELECT * FROM tbl_order_status_log WHERE order_id = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC

all_queries.name: Order Details - Call Log
all_queries.sql: SELECT * FROM tbl_order_call_log WHERE order_id = 1 ORDER BY called_at DESC

all_queries.name: Customers - List
all_queries.sql: SELECT * FROM tbl_customer ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 50

all_queries.name: Customers - Active Count
all_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_customer WHERE is_active = 1

all_queries.name: Products - List
all_queries.sql: SELECT * FROM tbl_product ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 50

all_queries.name: Employees - All Active
all_queries.sql: SELECT * FROM tbl_employee WHERE is_active = 1

all_queries.name: Employees - Ranking Query
all_queries.sql: SELECT e.id, e.full_name, e.email, e.telegram_chat_id, COUNT(oa.id) AS total_assigned, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'Pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pending_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'Confirmed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS confirmed_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS completed_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'Cancelled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS cancelled_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_status

all_queries.name: Audit Log - Full
all_queries.sql: SELECT * FROM tbl_audit_log ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 100

all_queries.name: Recovery - Dashboard Tasks
all_queries.sql: SELECT * FROM tbl_recovery_tasks ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 50

all_queries.name: Ecotrack - Delivery Stats Scan
all_queries.sql: SELECT ecotrack_remote_status, order_date FROM tbl_order WHERE ecotrack_tracking IS NOT NULL AND ecotrack_tracking != ''

all_queries.name: Top Categories
all_queries.sql: SELECT * FROM tbl_top_category

all_queries.name: Mid Categories
all_queries.sql: SELECT * FROM tbl_mid_category

all_queries.name: Commission - Payment Sum
all_queries.sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS total_paid FROM tbl_commission_payment WHERE employee_id = 1

all_queries.name: Performance - Employee KPIs
all_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_assigned, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS completed, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'Confirmed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS confirmed, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'Cancelled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS cancelled, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_status = 'Returned' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS returned, COALESCE(AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, o.order_date, COALESCE(o.last_update, NOW()))), 0) AS avg_processing_hours, CO

all_queries.name: Store - 7 Day Sales
all_queries.sql: SELECT DATE(order_date) AS day_key, COUNT(*) AS order_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN order_status IN ('Completed', 'Confirmed') THEN total_price ELSE 0 END), 0) AS revenue_total FROM tbl_order WHERE order_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(order_date) ORDER BY DATE(order_date) ASC
all_queries.extra: Using index condition; Using temporary; Using filesort

all_queries.name: Cache - Read
all_queries.sql: SELECT `value`, expires_at FROM tbl_cache WHERE `key` = 'benchmark_test' LIMIT 1

all_queries.name: Cache - Write
all_queries.sql: INSERT INTO tbl_cache (`key`, `value`, expires_at) VALUES ('benchmark_test', '1', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 60 SECOND)) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `value` = '1', expires_at = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 60 SECOND)

all_queries.name: Search - LIKE on customer name
all_queries.sql: SELECT * FROM tbl_customer WHERE full_name LIKE '%test%' LIMIT 20

all_queries.name: Search - LIKE on order status
all_queries.sql: SELECT * FROM tbl_order WHERE order_status LIKE '%end%' LIMIT 20

all_queries.name: Search - LIKE on product name
all_queries.sql: SELECT * FROM tbl_product WHERE p_name LIKE '%test%' LIMIT 20
